title: Taetoe Paxels
description: The most balanced Paxel pack out there!
body:
# 🥔 Taetoe Paxels 🥔

Paxels are a new type of tool that combines an axe, shovel and pickaxe into a single item! The tradeoff for saving two inventory spaces however is that paxels are slightly slower than their individual counterparts. This chart shows the exact speed differences, with higher numbers meaning a faster tool.

![A chart showing Paxel speeds compared to non-paxels. Paxels are roughly 30% Slower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f105612813b62295bff5ba423b6d9f670c81e235.png)

Paxels are able to be enchanted like normal, and are internally treated the same as any other tool. Paxels retain the axe's ability to strip wood and overpower shields, but not the shovels ability to make dirt paths (as it's currently impossible to have both).


## 🥔 Paxel Recipes🥔

In general, Paxels cost a little bit more to craft than their separated tool counterparts, but they make up for this in convenience.

![A showcase of all of the Paxel recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08a0752b58de8a53d70226413cf9128d59511481.gif)


## 🔧 Commands 🔧

Because datapacks currently have no support for custom items, I've added some commands that /give you Paxels

```
/function taetoe:give_wooden_paxel
/function taetoe:give_stone_paxel
/function taetoe:give_copper_paxel
/function taetoe:give_iron_paxel
/function taetoe:give_golden_paxel
/function taetoe:give_diamond_paxel
/function taetoe:give_netherite_paxel
```

## 💬 Language Support 💬
- English
- Portugese (by HyLion)
- Swedish (by Energybased)
- _Pirate Speak_

![The 7 Taetoe Paxels](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53fd7e50adc91e0e2fb029dfe2454c0b85f752a3.png)
